---

title: "Create a namespace"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a namespace"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/orgs/{orgId}/namespaces"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Onboards an ENS name into the organization as a managed namespace.

  as={"h2"}
